title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
